creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=telnetd&sektion=8&manpath=freebsd-ports#SYNOPSIS> begins: 

/usr/libexec/telnetd [-46BUhlkn] [-D debugmode] [-S tos] [-X authtype] [-a authmode] [-edebug] [-p loginprog] [-u len] [-debug [port]]


/usr/libexec/telnetd does not exist. Instead: 


grahamperrin:~ % pkg info --list freebsd-telnetd | grep libexec\/telnetd
        /usr/local/libexec/telnetd
grahamperrin:~ %
